name: Kuya Silver Corp.
description: Kuya Silver Corp. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on acquiring, exploring, and advancing precious metals assets in Peru and Canada. The company's flagship Bethania Silver Project in Central Peru is a past-producing mine currently ramping up production to generate revenue through silver-rich concentrates. Additionally, Kuya Silver holds the Silver Kings Project in Ontario, Canada, situated in the historic Cobalt mining camp. The company is dedicated to building a high-margin silver mining business by increasing production efficiency and aggressively exploring its district-scale projects to expand its resource base.
